title: Senior Teacher - S.Chand Group Capital India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - S.Chand Group Capital India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
S.Chand Group Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About S.Chand Group Capital India:
S.Chand Group Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group Capital India!
